questions.q: Who led the Detroit Pistons with 32 points and 12 assists in their Game 7 victory over the Orlando Magic to secure their first playoff series win in 18 years?
Irish actor Gary Lydon passed away at age 61 in May 2026. In which acclaimed film did he play a garda alongside Barry Keoghan?
Which strategy game recently reached the milestone of selling 500,000 copies in less than 72 hours of its release?
options: Heroes of Might and Magic: Olden Era
questions.correctText: "Heroes of Might and Magic: Olden Era" achieved 500,000 copies sold within its first three days on the market.

questions.q: Which Colorado Avalanche defenseman returned from injury to score twice in a 9-6 Game 1 playoff victory against the Minnesota Wild?
Which golfer won a tournament in Mexico by four shots to secure her third title of the 2026 season?
Which major medical center was reported on May 4, 2026, to be launching a "Pathway to Practical Nursing" program to transition its nursing assistants into licensed practical nurses?
According to a May 4, 2026 report, what toxic metal can contaminate brightly colored clothing without any requirement for testing?
Following the closure of their studio in early 2026, former employees of which Ubisoft studio branch recently announced the launch of a new independent developer called besszong?
questions.correctText: Former Ubisoft Halifax workers formed the indie studio besszong, with plans to create a multiplayer party game.
